# freeboxshadow.app

> Free online CSS box-shadow generator. Create, preview, and copy box shadows with a visual editor.

## What it does
Box Shadow Generator is a free, browser-based tool that lets you visually create CSS box shadows with live preview. Adjust offset, blur, spread, color, and opacity with sliders. Supports multiple shadow layers, inset shadows, and presets. All processing happens locally in your browser.

## Key facts
- 100% free, no sign-up required
- Works offline (PWA)
- Privacy-first: zero tracking, no cookies, no analytics
- Works on desktop, tablet, and mobile
- Part of the Freesuite collection (freesuite.app)

## Features
- Visual sliders for offset-x, offset-y, blur, spread, color, and opacity
- Live preview with instant updates
- Multiple shadow layers with independent settings
- Inset shadow support
- 9 built-in presets (subtle, medium, large, sharp, soft glow, layered, border, neumorphic, floating)
- Customizable preview background (light, dark, gradient)
- One-click CSS copy to clipboard
- Duplicate and delete individual layers

## Comparisons
- vs CSSGenerator.org: freeboxshadow.app is free with no ads and supports multiple shadow layers, CSSGenerator.org has ads and limited shadow options
- vs shadows.brumm.af: freeboxshadow.app offers preset styles and inset shadows, shadows.brumm.af focuses on layered shadow generation

## Related tools
- freegradientgen.app — CSS Gradient Generator
- freecolorconvert.app — Color Converter
- freejsonformatter.app — JSON Formatter

- [Home — Box Shadow Generator](https://freeboxshadow.app/)

- [Tailwind CSS Box Shadow Guide](https://freeboxshadow.app/pages/tailwind-box-shadow): Using box shadows in Tailwind CSS
